sourceWorkbooks.purpose: Primary center, McKesson route, pickup schedule, cost, mileage, case, pallet, PLC, coordinate, and rate-table source for the route/network presentation.
Storage KPI reference workbook used to validate storage-related KPI context where those metrics are presented.

notes: The browser presentation is intentionally backed by generated JSON, not direct workbook formulas at runtime.
Run the audit script after refreshing generated JSON from the two uploaded workbooks to verify the presentation payload matches the data files.
